zh.lifeSummary: 當Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone於1000年6月1日出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿時，他的父親Conde Ramon Borrell I29歲，母親Ermessinde de Carcassonne26歲。他於1021年2月2日與Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE在西班牙阿拉格昂結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1035年5月26日在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納利波爾桑塔 瑪麗亞享年34歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納利波爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone于1000年6月1日出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿时，他的父亲Conde Ramon Borrell I29岁，母亲Ermessinde de Carcassonne26岁。他于1021年2月2日与Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE在西班牙阿拉格昂结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1035年5月26日在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納利波爾桑塔 瑪麗亞享年34岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納利波爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barcelone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Amelita, Elvira, Jaime, Luis, Manuel, Mariano, Orlando, Ramon, Romelia.

Catalan and Spanish: habitational name from Barcelona, the principal city of Catalonia. The placename is of uncertain, certainly pre-Roman, origin. The settlement was established by the Carthaginians, and according to tradition it was named for the Carthaginian ruling house of Barca; the Latin form was Barcino or Barcilo.

variants.name: Barcelo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Carlos, Mario, Francisco, Juan, Ruben, Arturo, Eduardo, Humberto, Ignacio, Jaime.
Catalan (Barceló): apparently from the Latin personal name Barcelonus, a male equivalent of Barcelona, originally denoting someone from the city of Barcelona (see Barcelona ).

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone was born on 1 June 1000, in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Conde Ramon Borrell I, was 29 and his mother, Ermessinde de Carcassonne, was 26. He married Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE on 2 February 1021, in Aragón, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 26 May 1035, in Santa Maria, Ripoll, Girona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 34, and was buried in Ripoll, Girona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone est né le 1 juin 1000, à Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Conde Ramon Borrell I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ermessinde de Carcassonne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE le 2 février 1021, à Aragón, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 26 mai 1035, à Santa Maria, Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone am 1. Juni 1000 in Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conde Ramon Borrell I 29 und seine Mutter Ermessinde de Carcassonne 26. Er hat am 2. Februar 1021 in Aragón, Spanien Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 26. Mai 1035 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Santa Maria, Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone è nato il il 1 giugno 1000 nel Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, il suo padre, Conde Ramon Borrell I, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Ermessinde de Carcassonne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE il 2 febbraio 1021, nel Aragón, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 26 maggio 1035, nel Santa Maria, Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barceloneが1000年6月1日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナで生まれた時，父Conde Ramon Borrell Iは29歳，母Ermessinde de Carcassonneは26歳であった。1021年2月2日にスペインアラグoンでMunia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1035年5月26日にスペインカタルニーアギロナリポルサンタ マリアで34歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアギロナリポルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone(이)가 1000년 6월 1일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conde Ramon Borrell I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermessinde de Carcassonne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1021년 2월 2일 스페인 아라그o에서 Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1035년 5월 26일 스페인 카털니아 지로나 리폴 산타 마이아에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 지로나 리폴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone nasceu em 1 de junho de 1000, em Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, seu pai, Conde Ramon Borrell I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ermessinde de Carcassonne, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE em 2 de fevereiro de 1021, em Aragón, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 26 de maio de 1035, em Santa Maria, Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone родился 1 июня 1000 г. в местности барселона, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Conde Ramon Borrell I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermessinde de Carcassonne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE 2 февраля 1021 г. в местности арагoн, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 26 мая 1035 г. в местности санта маря, риполл, гирона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности риполл, гирона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone nació el 1 de junio de 1000, en Barcelona, Cataluña, España, su papá, Conde Ramon Borrell I, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Ermessinde de Carcassonne, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Munia Elvire Mayor de CASTILLE el 2 de febrero de 1021, en Aragón, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 26 de mayo de 1035, en Santa Maria, Ripoll, Gerona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Ripoll, Gerona, Cataluña, España.
